kb_article.title: How to reset your password
kb_article.body:
1. Open **Account** (top right)
2. Choose *Change password*

> Locked out? An admin can reset it under **Users**.

kb_article.title: VPN troubleshooting
kb_article.body:
## Common fixes

- Restart the client
- Check the gateway: `vpn.example.com`
- Still stuck? Raise an incident from the catalog.

kb_article.title: Laptop refresh policy (draft)
kb_article.body: Laptops are refreshed every **3 years**. _Draft — pending approval._
